home.step2: 2. Enable Shotgun APIs, copy the token, and paste it here.

dashboard.title: ShotNotif
dashboard.sectionTelegramSubtitle: Connect your bot to receive sale alerts.
dashboard.messageSectionSubtitle: Write your message and add the fields to show.
dashboard.pickChatHint: Click the right chat to fill in the Chat ID.
dashboard.noChatsHint: No chats detected. Message your bot or your group, then try again.
dashboard.joinGroupsWarning: This bot cannot join groups. Enable <cmd>/setjoingroups</cmd> in BotFather.
dashboard.errPickChatId: Choose or enter a Chat ID.
dashboard.errVerifyBot: Could not verify this Telegram bot.
dashboard.errValidateChat: Could not validate this Telegram chat.
dashboard.deleteAccountZoneHint: Permanently deletes ShotNotif data held on our servers. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteAccountDialogBody: Your Shotgun account is unchanged. ShotNotif data we host will be permanently removed and cannot be restored.
dashboard.deleteAccountError: Could not delete the account. Try again.

telegram.webhookActive: Cannot detect chats because this bot already has an active webhook.
telegram.validateChatFailed: Could not validate this chat. Make sure the bot is in the chat and a message was already sent.
telegram.validateGeneric: Could not validate this Telegram chat.

telegram.step0: Open Telegram and start a chat with
telegram.step1: Send the /newbot command and follow the prompts: pick a name (e.g. ShotNotif) then a username (e.g. shotnotif_bot).
telegram.step2: BotFather sends a message with your Bot Token (looks like 7103948261:AAF…). Copy it and paste it in the field below.
telegram.step3: To get your Chat ID, first have the bot receive a message in the right place.
telegram.colPrivateBody: Open your bot, send it a message, then click Detect my chats.
telegram.colGroupBody: Add your bot to the group, send a message in that group, then click Detect my chats.

discord.step0: Create a webhook in the target channel.

whatsapp.step1: Get the Access Token and Phone Number ID.

bf.m1: Alright. A new bot. How are we going to call it? Please choose a name for your bot.
bf.m3a: Good. Now let's choose a username for your bot. It must end in
bf.m3b: . Like this, for example: TetrisBot or tetris_bot.
bf.m5a:
Done! Congratulations on your new bot.

Use this token to access the HTTP API:

whatsappPreview.encryptionNotice: Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted.

editor.placeholder: Write your notification here, then add Shotgun fields with the chips.
editor.eventNameRule: Show the event name only when there are at least 2 scheduled events
editor.eventNameRuleAria: Show event name only when at least 2 events are scheduled
editor.chipsHint: Click a field to add it.
editor.chipsHintDrag: Or drag it into the message.

event_name.label: Event name
event_name.example: KODZ X GUETTAPEN X MERCI LILLE : REBELION, ECSTATIC & MORE

new_tickets_count.label: New tickets count
new_tickets_count.description: Number of tickets in this notification.

first_deal_sold.label: Sold on this ticket
first_deal_sold.description: Total sold on the main type.

first_deal_max.label: Capacity for this ticket
first_deal_max.description: Max capacity of the main type.
